attributes.description:
When set to auto, navigating tabs with the arrow keys will instantly show the corresponding tab panel. When set to
manual, the tab will receive focus but will not show until the user presses spacebar or enter.
attributes.name: activation

attributes.description: Draws the tab group as a contained element.
attributes.name: contained

attributes.description: Prevent scroll buttons from being hidden when inactive.
attributes.name: fixed-scroll-controls

attributes.description: Disables the scroll arrows that appear when tabs overflow.
attributes.name: no-scroll-controls

attributes.description: Draws the tab group with edges instead of roundings. Takes only effect if used with the 'contained' property
attributes.name: sharp

cssParts.description: The line that highlights the currently selected tab.
cssParts.name: active-tab-indicator

cssParts.description: The tab group's body where tab panels are slotted in.
cssParts.name: body

cssParts.description: The tab group's navigation container where tabs are slotted in.
cssParts.name: nav

cssParts.description: The previous/next scroll buttons that show when tabs are scrollable, an `<syn-icon-button>`.
cssParts.name: scroll-button

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the tabs.
cssParts.name: tabs

events.description: Emitted when a tab is hidden. The payload of the event returns the "panel" attribute of the hidden tab.
events.name: syn-tab-hide

events.description: Emitted when a tab is shown. The payload of the event returns the "panel" attribute of the shown tab.
events.name: syn-tab-show

properties.description:
When set to auto, navigating tabs with the arrow keys will instantly show the corresponding tab panel. When set to
manual, the tab will receive focus but will not show until the user presses spacebar or enter.
properties.name: activation

properties.description: Draws the tab group as a contained element.
properties.name: contained

properties.description: Prevent scroll buttons from being hidden when inactive.
properties.name: fixedScrollControls

properties.description: Disables the scroll arrows that appear when tabs overflow.
properties.name: noScrollControls

properties.description: Draws the tab group with edges instead of roundings. Takes only effect if used with the 'contained' property
properties.name: sharp

slots.description: Used for grouping tab panels in the tab group. Must be `<syn-tab-panel>` elements.
Used for grouping tabs in the tab group. Must be `<syn-tab>` elements.
slots.name: nav

summary: Tab groups organize content into a container that shows one section at a time.
